subject: Unable to export PDF report
description: Clicking the Export PDF button causes infinite loading; file cannot be generated

comments.author: support1@company.com
comments.text: Please clear your browser cache and try again

comments.author: userA@client.com
comments.text: Still not working after clearing the cache

comments.author: support1@company.com
comments.text: Confirmed the issue was caused by insufficient memory on the backend PDF generation service; capacity has been expanded. Please try again.

subject: User permission error
description: Admin cannot access the user management page

comments.author: support2@company.com
comments.text: Admin permissions have been reassigned; please refresh the page

subject: Inaccurate data statistics
description: Daily active user data does not match actual visits; suspected statistical logic issue

comments.author: support1@company.com
comments.text: After investigation, the statistics are correct; it may be a difference in how you define the metric

comments.author: userC@client.com
comments.text: I compared server access logs and the discrepancy is 30%; this is not a definition issue

comments.author: support1@company.com
comments.text: Sorry, upon further investigation we confirmed a bug in the deduplication logic of the statistics script; it has been fixed. The data is now aligned.

subject: Email notification not working
description: Alert email notifications were configured but no emails have ever been received

comments.author: support3@company.com
comments.text: Checked your notification settings; the configuration looks correct. Issue has been logged and will be forwarded to the development team

subject: API rate limit too strict
description: Our business requires 100 API calls per second but the limit is set to 50

comments.author: support2@company.com
comments.text: The rate limit for your account has been increased to 200 per second

comments.author: userE@client.com
comments.text: Verified; the new rate limit is in effect. Thank you
